title: AuditRetentionPolicy
description: Per-tenant retention override. One active policy per tenant (partial unique index on `deleted_at IS NULL`). Requires audit_retention_extended entitlement (Enterprise-only) to create. Retention_years capped at config.audit.retention.max_years (10 default). override_reason must justify the extension to a compliance auditor reading the trail later.

override_reason.description: Compliance-officer justification. 10-500 chars enforced by valid_override_reason_shape rule.

override_starts_at.description: When the override begins. Defaults to now() when caller omits. Must be <= override_ends_at (when ends_at is set).

override_ends_at.description: When the override expires. NULL = indefinite. ExpireRetentionOverridesJob transitions the policy to soft-deleted when this timestamp elapses.

expiring_soon_notified_at.description: Idempotency marker for the 30d-advance-warning notification. Set when AuditRetentionExtensionExpiringSoonNotification is dispatched; prevents duplicate notifications.

notes.description: Free-form compliance officer notes. Not enforced shape; helpful for handoff to a successor officer.

indexes.name: audit_retention_policies_tenant_active_uniq
indexes.description: Partial unique — enforces one-active-policy-per-tenant. AuditRetentionPolicyObserver::creating validates proactively.

indexes.predicate: deleted_at IS NULL AND override_ends_at IS NOT NULL
indexes.name: audit_retention_policies_expiry_idx

is_active.description: Computed. True when deleted_at IS NULL AND override_starts_at <= now() AND (override_ends_at IS NULL OR override_ends_at > now()).

days_until_expiry.description: Computed. NULL when override_ends_at IS NULL (indefinite). Else ceil((override_ends_at - now()) / day). Negative when expired.

effective_retention_years.description: Computed. Returns retention_years when is_active; else config.audit.retention.default_years (7).

notes: override_reason is broadcast in full on the tenant channel to the compliance-officer role; trimmed for owner role.
notes are broadcast to compliance officer only.
